generated_oml:
instance TemperatureSensor1 : DTDFVocab:SystemComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 digital thermometer with 64-bit unique serial code, measuring range -55°C to +125°C, accuracy ±0.5°C between -10°C and 85°C"
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureDataTransmitted1
]

instance TemperatureSensor2 : DTDFVocab:SystemComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 digital thermometer with 64-bit unique serial code, measuring range -55°C to +125°C, accuracy ±0.5°C between -10°C and 85°C"
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureDataTransmitted2
]

instance TemperatureSensor3 : DTDFVocab:SystemComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 digital thermometer with 64-bit unique serial code, measuring range -55°C to +125°C, accuracy ±0.5°C between -10°C and 85°C"
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureDataTransmitted3
]

instance Heatbed : DTDFVocab:SystemComponent [
    base:desc "Heatbed (214×214×3 mm) for heating the incubator"
]

instance Fan : DTDFVocab:SystemComponent [
    base:desc "Fan (0.02 m³/s airflow) for air circulation in the incubator"
]

instance CustomPCB : DTDFVocab:SystemComponent [
    base:desc "Custom PCB with MOSFETs and optocouplers for safe actuation of heatbed and fan"
]

instance PowerSupply : DTDFVocab:SystemComponent [
    base:desc "Power supply for the thermal incubator system"
]

instance StyrofoamContainer : DTDFVocab:SystemComponent [
    base:desc "Styrofoam insulated container with 0.03 m³ air volume"
]

instance RabbitMQ : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "RabbitMQ message broker for communication between physical and virtual components"
    DTDFVocab:enables TemperaturePredictionService, RealTimeCalibrationService, SystemMonitoringService, BangBangControlService
]

instance RaspberryPi4 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Raspberry Pi 4 Model B controller for system control and data processing"
    DTDFVocab:enables TemperaturePredictionService, SystemMonitoringService, BangBangControlService
]

instance PythonScipy : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python Scipy library for non-linear least squares optimization in model calibration"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeCalibrationService
]

instance OneWireProtocol : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "1-Wire protocol for sensor communication with temperature sensors"
    DTDFVocab:enables TemperaturePredictionService, RealTimeCalibrationService, SystemMonitoringService
]

instance ModelA : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Uniform air temperature model with heat transfer to environment parameters C_air, G_box"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo RaspberryPi4
]

instance ModelB : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Thermal model including heatbed thermal inertia parameters C_heater, C_air, G_heater, G_box"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo RaspberryPi4
]

instance TemperatureData1 : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Temperature measurement data from DS18S20 sensor"
    DTDFVocab:fromData TemperatureDataTransmitted1
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PythonScipy, RaspberryPi4
]

instance TemperatureData2 : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Temperature measurement data from DS18S20 sensor"
    DTDFVocab:fromData TemperatureDataTransmitted2
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PythonScipy, RaspberryPi4
]

instance TemperatureData3 : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Temperature measurement data from DS18S20 sensor"
    DTDFVocab:fromData TemperatureDataTransmitted3
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PythonScipy, RaspberryPi4
]

instance TemperatureDataTransmitted1 : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom TemperatureSensor1
    DTDFVocab:fromData TemperatureData1
]

instance TemperatureDataTransmitted2 : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom TemperatureSensor2
    DTDFVocab:fromData TemperatureData2
]

instance TemperatureDataTransmitted3 : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom TemperatureSensor3
    DTDFVocab:fromData TemperatureData3
]

instance TemperaturePredictionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Simulation models for temperature prediction (Model A and B)"
    DTDFVocab:provides PredictiveTemperatureInsight
]

instance RealTimeCalibrationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time calibration of model parameters using non-linear least squares optimization"
    DTDFVocab:provides CalibrationAction
]

instance SystemMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "System monitoring for safety/optimality checks"
    DTDFVocab:provides SystemMonitoringInsight
]

instance BangBangControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Bang-bang control logic for temperature regulation based on sensor feedback"
    DTDFVocab:provides ControlAction
]

instance PredictiveTemperatureInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predictive temperature simulations informing control decisions"
]

instance CalibrationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Calibration action for updating model parameters using non-linear least squares optimization"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance SystemMonitoringInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "System monitoring insight for safety and optimality"
]

instance ControlAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Bang-bang control action (heating duration H and waiting duration C) for temperature regulation"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance IncubatorSystem : DTDFVocab:SystemUnderStudy [
    base:desc "Thermal incubator system comprising styrofoam insulated container (0.03 m³ air volume), heatbed, fan, three DS18S20 sensors, Raspberry Pi 4 controller, custom PCB, and power supply"
    base:hasEnvironment IncubatorEnvironment
]

instance IncubatorEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains Heatbed, Fan, TemperatureSensor1, TemperatureSensor2, TemperatureSensor3, CustomPCB, PowerSupply, StyrofoamContainer, RaspberryPi4
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Controller commands (e.g., heatbed on/off, fan speed) are sent via RabbitMQ to the low-level driver, which executes safe state transitions for physical actuation while maintaining device safety protocols."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Fan air circulation time of ~2 seconds (0.02 m³/s airflow over 0.03 m³ volume), heatbed heating response under 2 seconds (100W power), with controller parameters defining heating duration (H) and waiting duration (C) cycles."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "A RabbitMQ-orchestrated system where the physical incubator (PT) interacts with digital twin components (simulation models, controller logic, calibration algorithms) via message passing, all hosted on Raspberry Pi."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Operational phase ('as operated') of the physical incubator, where the digital twin integrates real-time data from the deployed system for ongoing monitoring and control."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Assumption validation through multi-sensor temperature uniformity experiments, model calibration via least squares optimization to minimize residual error between predicted and measured data, with Model B showing superior accuracy for thermal inertia prediction."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "RabbitMQ-based messaging for PT-DT communication, 1-Wire bus for sensor connectivity, and GPIO interfaces on Raspberry Pi for hardware control."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "All digital twin components (RabbitMQ server, controller, low-level driver, simulation models) deployed on a single Raspberry Pi 4 Model B."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Low-level driver incorporates a safe protocol to maintain device safety during actuation, though specific cybersecurity measures are not detailed in the document."
]
